name: paste
description: Merge lines from standard input side by side. With -s, concatenates all input lines into a single line separated by a delimiter. Without -s, reads from standard input and merges lines pairwise. Default delimiter is tab; use -d to specify a custom delimiter. Use for joining lines into a single row, converting a column of values into a comma-separated list, or combining fields from multiple sources.

input.description: Lines of text to merge, provided on standard input. The first argument is flags (e.g. '-s', '-d,', '-sd,').

output.description: Merged lines joined by the delimiter.
